creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
games/jinput seems to suffer some sort of Java specific problem:

[ERROR] Failed to execute goal org.apache.maven.plugins:maven-compiler-plugin:3.8.1:compile (default-compile) on project examples: Compilation failure: Compilation failure:
[ERROR] /wrkdirs/usr/ports/games/jinput/work/jinput-bf22dd975bbba31f01895332255b63df376894e6/examples/src/main/java/net/java/games/input/example/ReadFirstMouse.java:[3,28] cannot find symbol
[ERROR]   symbol:   class Component
[ERROR]   location: package net.java.games.input
[ERROR] /wrkdirs/usr/ports/games/jinput/work/jinput-bf22dd975bbba31f01895332255b63df376894e6/examples/src/main/java/net/java/games/input/example/ReadFirstMouse.java:[4,28] cannot find symbol
[ERROR]   symbol:   class Controller
[ERROR]   location: package net.java.games.input
[ERROR] /wrkdirs/usr/ports/games/jinput/work/jinput-bf22dd975bbba31f01895332255b63df376894e6/examples/src/main/java/net/java/games/input/example/ReadFirstMouse.java:[5,28] cannot find symbol
[ERROR]   symbol:   class ControllerEnvironment

I don't think this has anything to do with clang... :)
